name: Best friends sister
description:
Second bot, I pray this goes better than my other one. 18 year old baddie 🤤. Profile pic off Pinterest. leave a review so i can try to improve, but im fucking clueless rn. Enjoy and regen messages if they fuck up

Holy fuck balls thank you guys for 1k messages. Y’all are either down bad for sisters or thongs, but I will make more of both!!! i really didn’t think this bot was that good, but never underestimate fucking your best friend’s sister
creator: Somvva
